concerns.text: FR-003 and US-2 require collecting and storing individual item responses for the 7-item Attitude, 3-item Usefulness, and 4-item Trust scales to allow validation per Constitution VII. Task T023 only exports aggregated columns (e.g., `attitude_scale`), missing the requirement to preserve raw item data.

FR-009 and SC-002 require the system to 'support enforcement' of the N=300 target and 'flag' insufficient power if N < 300. Task T036 only implements the calculation (MDES) and comparison, lacking a task to implement the enforcement logic or the specific 'flag as insufficient' behavior in the final report.

The spec's Edge Cases and FR-007 require a sensitivity analysis that includes participants who failed the manipulation check (in addition to the exclusion analysis). Task T034 only covers the exclusion sensitivity analysis; there is no task to implement the inclusion/sensitivity analysis for the failed-check group.

FR-010 and SC-005 require validating that vignettes have no significant sentiment difference (≤ 0.05) *prior to deployment*. Task T013 implements the *check* (calculation) but lacks a task to implement the *rejection/regeneration* loop required to ensure the condition is met before the vignettes are considered valid for use.
